sources.name: UKHSA
sources.dataset: MRSA Bloodstream Infections and Bacteraemia Data for England

metadata.methodology: C.difficile cases from mandatory reporting of healthcare-associated C.difficile infections in NHS acute trusts. MRSA cases from mandatory reporting of MRSA bloodstream infections. Both are mandatory surveillance programmes operated by UKHSA. Figures cover England.
knownIssues: C.difficile data includes cases attributed to the trust (healthcare-associated) and community-onset cases; the split varies by trust and period
Pandemic period (2020-2021) data may be affected by changed patient pathways and reduced elective activity
Mandatory surveillance captures reported cases only; true incidence will be higher
